summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of employee evaluation system. All 9 navigation views working perfectly with full functionality including dynamic 9-box matrix, interactive sliders, filters, and professional UI design.
passed_tests: Dashboard General loads correctly on route / with 9-box matrix display
9-box matrix shows accurate employee counts per classification cell
Department filter in Dashboard works correctly and updates matrix
Employee List on /employees displays complete table with all employee data
Search functionality works for employee names, positions, and IDs
Department and classification filters work in employee list
Evaluation Templates on /evaluations display all available templates
Edit Weights functionality works with real-time weight input modification
Results Entry on /entry has functional employee and evaluation selectors
KPI and Values sliders work with real-time score updates
Manual override toggle works with all 9 classification options (A, B1-B4, C1-C4)
Navigation between all 9 views works seamlessly
Employee Profile displays correctly with banner and personal information
360 Evaluation has 45 functional rating buttons with 1-5 scale
KPI Evaluation shows 4 working sliders with progress indicators
Self Evaluation has 25 rating buttons and override functionality
9-Box Matrix View displays interactive 3x3 grid with cell details
Color coding system works correctly (green=A, yellow=B1-B4, orange/red=C1-C4)
Dynamic classification updates based on KPI and Values scores
Professional and consistent UI design across all views
All mock data displays correctly with proper formatting
Interactive elements are responsive and clickable
Dropdown selectors work for employees and evaluations
Weight editing preserves total percentage calculations
